name: Elemental Transfiguration: Thunderbloom Blessing
title: Elemental Transfiguration: Thunderbloom Blessing
desc: Thunder cracks, and creeping vines burst forth.
in_play_description:
Roll Phase: Always roll 2 Electro Dice and 2 Dendro Dice.
After you trigger a Catalyze reaction: Discard this card, then choose either Thunderbloom Blessing: Shatterbolt or Thunderbloom Blessing: Nexus and add it to your Hand.
